personal.name: Gunjan Ukani
personal.tagline: I turn complex business logic into fast, scalable products.
personal.summary: Results-driven Full Stack & Senior Frontend Developer with 2.5+ years shipping production-grade web and mobile apps across ERP, FinTech, marketplace, and healthcare. I architect scalable REST APIs, craft type-safe React interfaces, integrate real-time systems with Firebase, and own products end to end — from system design to VPS deployment.
personal.availability: Open to Senior Frontend & Full Stack roles

story.title: The Foundation
story.subtitle: BSc in Information Technology
story.description: It began at Atmiya University, where the fundamentals of computing turned into a fascination with the web. The first lines of code became a habit I never broke.

story.title: Going Deeper
story.subtitle: MSc IT + the React leap
story.description: While pursuing my Master's, I committed to React, earned my first development certification, and started building real interfaces instead of just studying them.

story.title: Into Production
story.subtitle: First professional role — healthcare
story.description: At Imbuesoft, I shipped a Medical Management System frontend with role-based views and automated clinical reporting. Tutorials gave way to real users and real responsibility.

story.title: Full-Stack Ownership
story.subtitle: ERP · FinTech · Marketplace
story.description: At Encrypted Infoweb I architect and ship production apps across four industries — owning the lifecycle from system design and APIs to VPS deployment and live monitoring.

experience.role: MERN Stack Developer / Full Stack Engineer
experience.summary: Architecting and shipping production web & mobile apps for real business clients across ERP, FinTech, and marketplace verticals.
experience.impact: Delivered 5+ production-grade applications end to end — from system design and REST APIs to VPS deployment and live monitoring.
achievements: Architected 5+ production apps with React, Next.js, TypeScript, Node, Express & MongoDB for real, paying clients.
Engineered REST APIs with optimized MongoDB/PostgreSQL queries and indexing to cut average response times.
Built type-safe, reusable React component libraries that raised UI velocity across concurrent projects.
Integrated Firebase (Firestore, Realtime DB, Cloud Messaging) for push notifications and live data sync.
Deployed and maintained apps on VPS with Nginx + Ubuntu, establishing CI/CD-ready release workflows.
Resolved critical multi-currency transaction, tax, and PDF-pipeline bugs on live FinTech platforms.

experience.summary: Built the frontend for a healthcare Medical Management System used by clinical staff.
experience.impact: Delivered a complete patient-records UI with role-based views and one-click clinical reporting in 6 months.
achievements: Developed a full patient record management UI with role-based views and responsive layouts.
Engineered a reusable component library with optimized rendering to cut UI duplication.
Implemented automated PDF generation for clinical reports and invoices with React-PDF.
Delivered consistent mobile-first UX across desktop, tablet, and mobile viewports.

projects.name: Enterprise ERP System
projects.problem: Enterprise clients juggled leads, deals, attendance, and leave across disconnected tools with no single source of truth.
projects.challenge: Unify CRM and HRMS into one platform whose modules could scale independently while sharing auth and permissions.
projects.solution: A modular ERP with CRM and HRMS modules — lead management, deal pipelines, task assignment, attendance, and leave — under shared role-based access.
projects.implementation: Built on the MERN stack with TypeScript and Tailwind, using JWT-based RBAC and a modular architecture that lets each module scale on its own.
projects.results: A unified platform adopted by enterprise clients, replacing fragmented tools with one coherent, permission-aware system.

projects.name: PayYit
projects.problem: A live payments product was producing financial inaccuracies in multi-currency transactions and tax calculations.
projects.challenge: Stabilize real-money flows — fixing cross-currency rounding and tax logic — with absolutely zero data loss.
projects.solution: Debugged and hardened the multi-currency transaction engine and rebuilt the tax-calculation and rounding logic for correctness.
projects.implementation: Worked across the MERN stack with TypeScript, also optimizing the PDF invoice/reporting pipeline for speed and regulatory-compliant output.
projects.results: Restored financial accuracy and system stability on a live platform — with zero data loss during remediation.

projects.name: Beauty Salon Manager
projects.problem: Salons needed a single way to handle appointments, services, and staff across both phones and an admin desk.
projects.challenge: Ship one codebase to iOS and Android with real-time reminders and live data sync across every client.
projects.solution: A React Native + Expo app with a centralized admin panel for scheduling, service catalogs, and staff coordination.
projects.implementation: Integrated Firebase Cloud Messaging for push reminders and promotions, with Firestore keeping mobile clients in real-time sync.
projects.results: A cross-platform product serving active users, replacing manual booking with live, notification-driven scheduling.

projects.name: Global Scrap Exchange
projects.problem: Scrap service providers and clients had no unified marketplace connecting them across regions.
projects.challenge: Build a dual-platform marketplace with dynamic catalogs, vouchers, and media — all governed from one control plane.
projects.solution: An iOS/Android marketplace with dynamic product/service catalogs, gift vouchers, and media galleries.
projects.implementation: Built with React Native, Node.js, MongoDB, and Firebase, plus a unified admin 'Command Center' for global settings, team assignment, and localized content.
projects.results: A distributed marketplace operable from a single admin hub, connecting providers and clients at scale.

projects.name: Legacy One
projects.problem: Teams needed secure, structured document storage with cloud sync and granular access control.
projects.challenge: Combine cloud integration, multi-language support, and role-based access over reliable structured storage.
projects.solution: A cloud-integrated secure document management system with Google Drive sync and a role-based admin panel.
projects.implementation: Built on the MERN stack with TypeScript and Tailwind, backed by PostgreSQL for structured storage and multi-language support throughout.
projects.results: A secure, permission-aware document platform with live cloud sync and localized access.

education.detail: Advanced study in software systems, web technologies, and application architecture.
Foundations in programming, databases, and computer science fundamentals.

achievements.label: Production Apps Shipped
achievements.description: Real products delivered to paying clients.

achievements.label: Cross-Platform Apps
achievements.description: iOS & Android with live Firebase sync.

philosophy.title: Design the System First
philosophy.description: Before a line of UI, I model the data, the modules, and the access rules — so features scale independently instead of becoming tomorrow's tech debt.

philosophy.title: Own the Whole Lifecycle
philosophy.description: System design → API → frontend → VPS deployment → production monitoring. Shipping isn't done at merge; it's done when it's stable in front of real users.

philosophy.title: Performance & Correctness Are Features
philosophy.description: From query indexing and code splitting to fixing multi-currency rounding with zero data loss — speed and accuracy are requirements, not afterthoughts.

philosophy.title: Build Reusable, Type-Safe Foundations
philosophy.description: Type-safe component libraries and clear documentation raise the whole team's velocity and make codebases a pleasure to onboard into.
